plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Nostr Photos to access your camera
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Nostr Photos to access your microphone for video recording

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Nostr Photos to access your photos so you can import selected photos or your full library into your Nostr photo archive.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Nostr Photos to save media when needed.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Nostr Photos to let you choose photos to import into your Nostr photo archive.
